descriptions.quickpass: Revolutionary traffic compliance solution developed during the Goa Police Hackathon and officially deployed for active use by Traffic Police across Goa. Drivers generate a 24-hour QR code as proof of compliance, eliminating repeated document checks at traffic stops. India's first app of its kind — launched by the Hon. Chief Minister of Goa, Dr. Pramod Sawant. Features real-time tracking, automated validation, location-based verification, and SMS notifications.
descriptions.contentai: AI-powered content management system that transforms simple campaign goals into complete marketing strategies. Built in 2 days by learning ReactJS from scratch — as a Flutter developer. Ranked Top 30 nationally (out of 5,000+ teams) and Top 12 in the AI Track at HackIndia 2025. Features AI-driven campaign generation, persona analysis, competitor research automation, Instagram analytics integration, living AI mascot system, and SEO-optimized content generation.
descriptions.needy-paws: Comprehensive mobile platform connecting stray animals with adopters, NGOs, vets, and rescuers — published on Play Store. Won 8+ ideathons across NIT Goa, AITD Mapusa, RIT Goa, GEC, and DBCE. Features Google Maps integration, 1-on-1 chat, AI chatbot (Max) powered by OpenAI, community feed, veterinarian listing, push notifications, and image-based AI guidance for animal care.
descriptions.tracq: Smart waste management ecosystem that won both Technix 2025 (1st Place at GEC) and IDEAS 4.0 (1st Place at PCCE). Features RFID-based garbage collection tracking, real-time municipality dashboard, AI models for illegal dumping detection, garbage overflow monitoring, cleanliness scoring, and waste segregation guidance. Built with transparency and accountability in mind — bridging the gap between ground reality and municipal records. Future roadmap includes CCTV infrastructure integration for automated monitoring.
descriptions.diam-flow: Blockchain-based transparent asset distribution system built at Hacker House Goa — chosen from 25,000+ registrations, ranked 4th overall. Developed from zero blockchain knowledge to functional Web3 application in 6 days. Uses Diamante Blockchain for traceable public funds, fair worker payments, and smart contract-based milestone vesting. A first-ever Web3 experience that opened a new frontier.
descriptions.siddharth-constructions: Modern, responsive corporate website for a civil contracting and real estate firm — built with Next.js, Framer Motion, and EmailJS. Fully live on Vercel. Includes a structured hero section, services showcase, project gallery, client testimonials, and a Google Maps-integrated contact form. Zero backend required — EmailJS handles all inquiries directly.
